executiveSummary: AI-powered DSE stock analysis skills providing comprehensive market analysis with momentum trading patterns, investment strategies, and business intelligence. Distributed via Agent Skills (gh skill), MCP server, and CLI with robust data integration and CI/CD infrastructure.
problemStatement: Bangladesh stock market investors need intelligent analysis tools for DSE that combine momentum trading, fundamental investment analysis, and business intelligence. These tools must be accessible through modern AI agents and MCP clients while maintaining professional-grade quality and supply chain security.
targetUsers: DSE investors using AI coding agents
MCP client developers integrating stock analysis
Backend developers using CLI tools directly
objectives: Provide 14 specialized analysis skills for comprehensive DSE market analysis
Enable distribution through gh skill install for coding agents
Expose skills as MCP tools for MCP client consumption
Implement pluggable data adapters for DSE market data
Establish CI/CD pipeline with testing and security scanning
Ensure discoverability through documentation and registries
inScope: 14 DSE analysis skills (technical, fundamental, momentum, risk, etc.)
Agent Skills format publication and validation
MCP server wrapping skills as tools
Composite pipeline tools for end-to-end analysis
CI/CD with automated testing and releases
constraints: Skills must be stdlib-only Python with no network calls
Must comply with DSE data usage policies
Must conform to Agent Skills spec

requirements.title: Core DSE Analysis Skills
requirements.description: Implement 14 specialized skills for DSE stock analysis including technical-analysis, fundamental-analysis, momentum-scanner, volume-analyzer, support-resistance, trend-detector, market-sentiment, risk-manager, position-sizer, signal-synthesizer, pattern-recognizer, market-screener, financial-analyzer, and pr-summarizer
requirements.rationale: These skills form the analytical foundation of the entire system

requirements.title: Momentum Trading Formulas
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive momentum indicators including RSI, MACD, ROC, MFI, ADX, moving averages, Minervini SEPA criteria, Driehaus buy-high-sell-higher strategy, volume confirmation signals, and risk-adjusted position sizing
requirements.rationale: Momentum trading is a key requirement for DSE traders

requirements.title: Investment Analysis Criteria
requirements.description: Implement value investment criteria from Buffett, Graham, and Lynch including economic moat assessment, ROE analysis, PEG ratios, margin of safety calculations, and comprehensive scoring systems
requirements.rationale: Long-term investors need fundamental analysis beyond momentum

requirements.title: Agent Skills Publication
requirements.description: Publish skills to default branch conforming to agentskills.io spec, enabling installation via gh skill install for Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and other supported hosts
requirements.rationale: Primary distribution channel for coding agents

requirements.title: MCP Server Implementation
requirements.description: Provide MCP server exposing one tool per skill plus composite tools (analyze_ticker, screen_market) with subprocess dispatch to maintain single source of truth
requirements.rationale: Many clients consume MCP tools rather than Agent Skills

requirements.title: Data Adapter Layer
requirements.description: Implement pluggable data adapter with provider interface supporting file/DB and DSE providers, producing shared input contract with caching and rate limiting
requirements.rationale: Skills need data but must remain pure without network calls

requirements.title: Dual Transport Support
requirements.description: Support both stdio transport for desktop/IDE clients and streamable HTTP for hosted deployments
requirements.rationale: Covers both local and hosted consumption models

requirements.title: Zero-Install Packaging
requirements.description: Distribute via npx/uvx runners and Docker containers with copy-paste configuration for Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP clients
requirements.rationale: Low-friction setup drives adoption

requirements.title: CI/CD Pipeline
requirements.description: GitHub Actions for PR validation (lint, test, spec check) and release automation (package publishing, immutable releases, provenance)
requirements.rationale: Ensures quality and enables trusted releases

requirements.title: Supply Chain Security
requirements.description: Enable secret scanning, code scanning, immutable releases, tag protection, and provenance/SBOM generation
requirements.rationale: Executable code requires supply chain hardening

requirements.title: Comprehensive Testing
requirements.description: Unit tests for skills, integration tests for MCP server, fixture-based validation, performance benchmarks, and security scanning
requirements.rationale: Professional-grade quality requires comprehensive testing

requirements.title: Documentation and Discovery
requirements.description: Maintain README with installation guides, USAGE documentation, sample data, skill quickstarts, and registry listings for discovery
requirements.rationale: Users need clear documentation to adopt the suite

requirements.title: Multi-Agent Analysis System
requirements.description: Implement three specialized agents: Momentum Trading Agent (technical indicators), Investment Analysis Agent (fundamentals), Business Analysis Agent (company evaluation) with clear separation of responsibilities
requirements.rationale: Different perspectives provide comprehensive analysis

requirements.title: Criteria Checklists
requirements.description: Provide interactive checklists for momentum (25 criteria) and investment (30 criteria) with visual indicators, explanations, and actionable recommendations
requirements.rationale: Beginners need clear criteria with explanations

requirements.title: Numerical Price Predictions
requirements.description: Calculate specific buy prices, sell targets, and stop-loss levels using momentum formulas and risk management, not just signals
requirements.rationale: Users need actionable price points for trading decisions

requirements.title: DSE Market Adaptation
requirements.description: Adapt global criteria to Bangladesh market realities including local P/E benchmarks, sector-specific weightings, regulatory factors, and Bengali language support
requirements.rationale: Global criteria must be adapted to DSE market conditions

requirements.title: Educational Components
requirements.description: Provide beginner-friendly explanations for all financial terms, interactive learning modes, visual indicators, and decision impact examples
requirements.rationale: Users need to understand analysis to make informed decisions

requirements.title: Performance Requirements
requirements.description: Single skill execution < 2s, composite pipeline < 10s, support 100 concurrent MCP connections, memory usage < 512MB
requirements.rationale: System must be responsive for real-time decision making

requirements.title: Versioning and Maintenance
requirements.description: Adopt semver, maintain changelog, implement deprecation policy, periodic re-validation against evolving specs
requirements.rationale: Predictable evolution for downstream consumers

requirements.title: Compliance and Disclaimers
requirements.description: All outputs must include educational-only disclaimers, use public data only, respect rate limits, and comply with regulations
requirements.rationale: Legal and ethical requirements for financial analysis tools
